# Architecture Decisions

**Purpose**: Document why the system is built this way and key trade-offs.

**Format**: One decision per section with clear trade-offs documented

---

## How to Document a Decision

```markdown
## [Decision Name]

| Property         | Value                                    |
| ---------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| **Decision**     | [What choice was made?]                  |
| **Context**      | [What forces required this decision?]    |
| **Why**          | [Why is this better than other options?] |
| **Alternatives** | [What else was considered?]              |
| **Trade-off**    | [What are we giving up?]                 |
| **Pattern**      | [How do we implement this?]              |
| **Risk**         | [What could go wrong?]                   |
| **Mitigation**   | [How do we handle the risk?]             |
| **Revisit when** | [What triggers a reconsideration?]       |
| **Discovered**   | [Date] by [Agent]                        |
```

---
